steps.assistant_text: rmon set-breakpoint (__rmonSetBreak-class, 112 insns). The documented permuter-immune cap (target computes each $a1 arg op into a fresh temp + move $a1,tN copy-back x4; 7.1 -O1 folds in place, 4 words short) is a 7.1-only fold — IDO 5.3 -O1 emits the temp+move form.
